nasb.text: But they kept silent, for on the way they had discussed with one another which of them was the greatest.

esv.text: But they kept silent, for on the way they had argued with one another about who was the greatest.

cnv.text: 門徒一聲不響，因為他們在路上彼此爭論誰為大。

ccb.text: 他们都沉默不语，因为刚才他们在争论谁最伟大。

csbs.text: 门徒们却不做声，因为他们在路上彼此争论谁更大。
